sections.paragraph:
ὁμείρομαι (also ἱμείρομαι v.l., but prob. not related etym., s. DELG; CIG III 4000, 7 [IV a.d.] ὁμειρόμενοι περὶ παιδός [Ramsay, JHS 38, 1918, 157; 160]; Job 3:21 οἳ ὁμείρονται τοῦ θανάτου [v.l. ἱμείρ.]; Ps 62:2 Sym. Hesychius explains it w. ἐπιθυμεῖν.—Thackeray 97; GMilligan, Exp. 9th Ser. II 1924, 227f) to have a strong yearning, long for τινός someone 1 Th 2:8 (W-H. write ὀμ. [s. Schwyzer I 715 n. 10], s. app. 152; Mlt-H. 251; ADebrunner, IndogF 21, 1907, 203f; W-S. §16, 6; B-D-F §101 p. 53f, on the constr. s. §171, 1; Rob. 508).—DELG ὀμείρομαι. M-M. TW.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

prob. prob. = probable, probably

etym. etym. = etymology, -ical

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

Ramsay Ramsay = WR.—Lists 3, 6

JHS JHS = Journal of Hellenic Studies—List 6

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Thackeray Thackeray = HT., A Grammar of the OT in Greek according to the Septuagint—List 6

Exp. Exp. = Expositor—List 6

W-H. W-H. = BWestcott/FHort—List 1, beg.

Schwyzer Schwyzer = ES., Griechische Grammatik—List 6

app. app. = appendix, apparatus (when ref. to marginal text-critical information, esp. in N.)

Mlt-H. Mlt-H. = JMoulton/WHoward, A Grammar of NT Greek II: Accidence and Word-formation—List 6

IndogF IndogF = Indogermanische Forschungen—List 6

W-S. W-S. = GWiner, Grammatik des neutestamentlichen Sprachidioms, ed. PSchmiedel—List 6

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

constr. constr. = construction

Rob. Rob. = ATRobertson, A Grammar of the Greek NT in the Light of Historical Research—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 705
